target: ACL27 supplement page 40 theory failure-mode interpretation map v2
reason_independent_review_not_used: Subagent spawning is restricted to explicit user requests in this environment; review followed the render-visual-reviewer and research-figure-ai-slot-composer checklists locally.

measurement.layout_guard_active_definition: RGB pixels where max(channel)-min(channel) > 15 or mean(channel) < threshold, matching tests/test_paper_layout.py figure-density checks.
measurement.page_active245_definition: RGB pixels where max(channel)-min(channel) > 15 or mean(channel) < 245, matching the sparse-page density audit.
measurement.red_pixel_fraction_definition: RGB pixels where R > 150, G < 90, and B < 90, matching tests/test_paper_layout.py red fallback checks.

layout_iteration.before: The v1 failure-mode map was a 1800 x 1300 landscape board; on page 40 it left a large blank lower half after the caption in the round38 sparse-page review.
layout_iteration.after: The v2 map uses a 1800 x 1800 board, raises the PDF placement to 0.74 textheight, and adds a bottom failure-mode evidence wall with a contain-placed AI gate plus material, target, route, and selected-failure render crops.
layout_iteration.ai_slot_containment_update: The v2 failure-mode gate is placed with contain scaling through _fit(..., cover=False), following the updated AI-slot composition rule that generated slots should not be center-cropped or occluded.
layout_iteration.result: Accepted: the supplement remains 45 pages, Figure S38 and its caption fit on page 40, page 39 remains the theory bridge, and page 41 still starts the hypothesis text normally.

visual_review.standalone_figure: PASS: the figure now has a dense lower evidence wall while preserving the four original interpretation lanes and claim-boundary cards.
visual_review.ai_slot_asset: PASS: the raw v2 AI slot has no readable words, numbers, logos, or watermarks and works as an exposition-only gate schematic.
visual_review.ai_slot_composed_crop: PASS: the evidence-wall crop shows the AI slot contained inside its card with no center-crop loss; surrounding render crops fill the wall without overlapping labels.
visual_review.pdf_page_40: PASS: the expanded Figure S38 and caption fit on one page without clipping, caption collision, or page-count spill.
visual_review.neighbor_pages: PASS: page 39 remains the theory visual bridge and page 41 remains the hypothesis-boundary companion and text page.
visual_review.claim_boundary: PASS: deterministic labels and caption keep the map a reading aid over existing evidence, not a new experiment, population rate, or converter ranking.

verification_commands: python - <<'PY' from paper.shared.figures.gen_supplement_task_media_atlases import build_theory_failure_mode_map; build_theory_failure_mode_map() PY
